title: Berberine vs Inositol for Insulin Resistance After 40: Which Works Better?
seo_title: Berberine vs Inositol for Insulin Resistance After 40
meta_description: Berberine and inositol both target insulin resistance through different mechanisms. See which has stronger evidence for women over 40 and whether combining them makes sense.
tags: Metabolism, Insulin Resistance, Berberine, Inositol, Supplements, Women Over 40
